vis.onDesc: Other devices can find this computer
vis.ghostDesc: Auto-restores in 1 hour · transfers keep running
vis.offDesc: Stop announcing this device on the LAN
vis.ghostToast: Ghost mode on · visibility restores in 1 hour

titles.devicesSubEmpty: LAN · scanning · no devices found yet
titles.trustedSub: Drag into the circle to trust · others ask every time

header.pairTitle: Invite a device with a QR code or pairing code
header.quickTextTitle: Send text or a link straight to their clipboard

common.milestoneNote: This feature's backend lands in a later milestone — the UI is ready.

devices.offlineToast: Device is offline, try again later
devices.dragHint: Drop files on a device to send · click a device to pick files · or drop anywhere in the window
devices.emptyHint: The other device must run LanBeam, join the same network and be discoverable
devices.ck1On: This device is announcing on the LAN and is discoverable
devices.ck1Ghost: This device is in ghost mode — others can see it once visibility is restored
devices.ck1Off: Discovery is off — others can see this device once it's enabled
devices.ck2: Same Wi-Fi on both ends? Guest networks are usually isolated
devices.ck3: Router AP/client isolation on? Turn it off or use ethernet
devices.ck4: Does the firewall allow local discovery (UDP 51703)?
devices.badAddr: Enter a valid IP address (or ip:port)
devices.noDevicesToast: No devices found yet · use Pair to invite one

transfers.noRunning: No active transfers — drop a file on a device on the Devices page.

detail.evCreatedOutSub: Waiting for the peer to accept
detail.footSendDir: Save location is up to the receiver
detail.openDirUnavailable: Can't open the folder — the file may have moved or is from an old session
detail.evWaitingAccept: Waiting for the peer to accept

inbox.empty: Nothing received in this category yet.
inbox.menuRemoveNote: Removes the record only, keeps the file
inbox.removedToast: Removed from inbox · file kept on disk
inbox.removedBatchToast: Removed {{n}} records · files kept on disk
inbox.noPathToast: File location unknown — record from an old session

trusted.untrustedNote: Untrusted · asks every time — drag into the circle to trust
trusted.hintFree: Drag in to trust · drag out to remove · current network only, auto-revoked on fingerprint change
trusted.hintSlots: Many devices: released chips snap to slots · dragging in/out still works
trusted.hintList: Lots of devices: the circle is an overview (click to select) · search and toggle trust in the list
trusted.removedFromCircleToast: Moved {{name}} out of the trust circle

settings.visOnDesc: Other devices can find this computer
settings.visGhostDesc: Hidden for one hour without interrupting transfers, then auto-restores
settings.visOffDesc: This computer is hidden and can't be discovered
settings.recvPolicyDesc: Default behavior for incoming transfer requests
settings.autoOpenDesc: Reveal in the file manager after receiving
settings.verifyDesc: SHA-256 · turning it off is slightly faster
settings.notifSysDesc: Notify on requests and completed transfers
settings.soundDesc: Play on new requests and completed transfers
settings.clipShareDesc: Let a sender's text land on this device's clipboard
settings.hotkeyCapture: Press the new shortcut… (Esc to cancel)
settings.hotkeyTaken: That shortcut is already in use — try another
settings.portInvalid: Port must be 1024–65535 · leave empty for the default
settings.portSavedToast: Listen port saved · applies after restart
settings.ssidDesc: When limited, ghosts automatically off that network
settings.exifDesc: Removes EXIF: location, camera, time · adjustable per send
settings.histKeepDesc: Old transfer records are cleared automatically
settings.resetIdDesc: Generates a new fingerprint; every device must re-confirm
settings.e2eNote: All transfers are end-to-end encrypted (Noise_XX mutual auth · forward secrecy) and this cannot be disabled; LanBeam collects and uploads nothing.
settings.logLevelDesc: Always on, never includes file contents, local only · Verbose logs each chunk
settings.updateManual: Currently v0.1.0 · auto-update not configured yet
settings.licenseSelfNote: LanBeam itself is MIT-licensed · full license texts ship with the source

send.subWaiting: Each device gets its own encrypted session and code
send.devEmpty: No devices available — invite one with Pair
send.e2eLine: End-to-end encrypted · Noise_XX mutual auth · forward secrecy
send.sasLabel: Code · must match the peer's screen
send.sasNote: Each device is an independent encrypted session · codes derive from session keys
send.canceledToast: Closed — sent requests are up to the peers
send.browserRecv: No LanBeam on their side? Browser receive →
send.sentAllToast: All devices verified the code and started receiving
send.sentOneToast: {{name}} verified the code and is receiving

net.udpDegraded: Discovery receive degraded (port busy) · others may not see you
net.tcpFallback: Listen port busy · using an ephemeral port

errors.peerTooOld: The other device runs an older LanBeam — update it to receive files
errors.integrity: SHA-256 mismatch — the corrupted file was deleted; resend to retry
errors.generic: Something went wrong — please try again
errors.peerNotFound: That device isn't reachable right now
errors.protocol: The connection failed — please try again
errors.timeout: Timed out — the other device didn't respond
errors.io: A file or disk error occurred
errors.identityMismatch: The device's identity didn't match — it may have reset
errors.unsafePath: That file name isn't safe to save

incoming.sasLabel: Code · accept only if it matches the sender's screen
incoming.trustCheck: Auto-accept this device from now on

conflict.title: "{{name}}" already exists
conflict.sub: An incoming file has the same name as one in the download folder
conflict.subMulti: This and {{n}} more incoming file(s) match names in the download folder
conflict.existingLine: A file with this name is already in the folder
conflict.keepBothSub: Save the incoming file under a numbered name
conflict.overwriteSub: Replace the existing file with the incoming one
conflict.skipSub: Keep the existing file — declines this transfer

pair.title: Pair a new device
pair.sub: Bring in phones or devices that can't be discovered yet
pair.scanHint: Scan with a phone camera or LanBeam
pair.linkLoaded: Pairing link loaded · review and Join
pair.validity: Valid for 10 minutes · this LAN only
pair.waiting: Waiting for a device to join…
pair.joinedSub: Fingerprints exchanged · now visible on the radar
pair.badAddr: Put their IP or pair link here — the 6-digit code goes in the box on the right
pair.foot: After pairing both sides pin fingerprints · auto-recognized on this network from then on

qt.title: ⌁ Quick text
qt.sub: Send text or a link · never touches disk
qt.clipToo: Ask to also write to their clipboard
qt.foot: End-to-end encrypted · instant while online · also via the global shortcut

share.title: Receive in a browser
share.copiedToast: Link copied · open it in a browser on this subnet
share.lanNote: Local network only — the file goes straight from this device to theirs, never through a server. If a browser warns "not secure", that's normal for a local link; just continue.
share.stoppedToast: Sharing stopped · the link is dead
share.startFailed: Couldn't start sharing · check the files still exist, then reopen to try again
share.demoNote: Browser receive runs in the desktop app · this web demo has no local file server
share.foot: Subnet-only · never leaves the LAN · the link dies when you stop sharing

fp.warnSub: Trust and auto-accept are suspended for it
fp.explain: Usually the peer reinstalled or reset its identity — but it could be a same-name impostor. Verify a code together in person once to restore trust.
fp.verifySub: Both screens must show the same code · best done in person
fp.sasLabel: Code · derived from the new session key
fp.verifyNote: Once they match, the new fingerprint is saved and trust restored
fp.matchToast: Codes match · trust restored with the new fingerprint
fp.mismatchToast: Left untrusted · confirm the device with its owner in person
fp.removedToast: Trust removed · the device is back to ask-every-time
fp.changedToast: "{{name}}" has a new fingerprint · trust suspended

drag.hint: Drop on a device to send directly · release anywhere else to pick a device
